name: Crock Pot Italian Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg Good Seasons Italian Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the water, au jus gravy packet, Italian dressing mix, and Italian seasoning.
2. Place the roast in the crock-pot.
3. Pour the mixture over the roast.
4. Add the pepperocini peppers on top, if desired.
5. Cook on LOW for about 2 hours.
6. Turn off the heat and break up the roast.
7. Continue cooking for an additional hour.
